name: Watermelon Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring sugar and water to a boil; cool.
2. Scoop watermelon with a melon baller; discard seeds.
3. Pour sugar syrup over watermelon balls. Scoop remaining watermelon and squeeze in a clean cloth to extract juice.
4. Combine watermelon balls, watermelon juice, and brandy; chill.
5. Cut the upper edge of the watermelon shell in a saw-tooth design and use as a punch bowl.
6. Just before serving, add watermelon mixture, soda, and ice cubes to watermelon shell.
7. Sprinkle with nuts. Makes 10 to 12 servings.
